top_signals.title: Reform UK tax cut pledge raises doubts
top_signals.summary: Reform UK’s tax cut pledge for workers doing overtime hours is facing criticism from economists across the political spectrum amid doubts it would boost productivity.  The party said it would scrap income tax above a 40-hour week for workers on less than £75,000, costing around £5bn a year and paid for through cuts to welfare [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
